cheddar.ex: She put a slice of mature cheddar cheese on the brown bread.

cheek.def: 臉頰、厚顏、粗魯、在臉部的人的人物、粗魯地 (臉)
cheek.col: tongue in cheek (開玩笑), turn the other cheek (容忍), rosy cheek
cheek.ex: The little boy had a bright red rosy cheek from the cold air.

cheeky.def: 厚臉皮的、無禮的的人人物 (魯)
cheeky.ex: The cheeky monkey stole a banana from the tourist's hand.

cheep.def: (雛鳥)吱吱叫、尖叫的人的人、尖叫地 (叫)
cheep.ex: We heard the faint cheep of the young birds in the high nest.

cheer.def: 歡呼、激勵、喝采、心情、高興的人的人物、歡呼地 (歡)
cheer.col: cheer up (振作), three cheers for..., holiday cheer, cheer on
cheer.ex: The crowd began to cheer as the local team scored a goal.

cheerful.def: 愉快的、樂觀的的人的人物 (快)
cheerful.ex: She gave me a very cheerful smile as I entered the room.

cheerfully.ex: He agreed cheerfully to help us with the heavy moving.

cheerfulness.ex: Her habitual cheerfulness makes her very popular at work.

cheerily.ex: She waved cheerily at her friends as they drove away tonight.

cheering.def: 令人振奮的、歡呼的人 (或物) (歡)
cheering.ex: The cheering crowd greeted the victorious soldiers warmly today.

cheerleader.ex: The school cheerleader led the crowd in a loud and rhythmic chant.

cheerless.def: 不快樂的、陰鬱的、無精打采地 (陰)
cheerless.ex: The empty and dark room was cold, quiet, and truly cheerless.

cheery.def: 愉快的、興高采烈的人人物 (快)
cheery.ex: He gave us a cheery hello as he passed by on his bike.

cheese.def: 起司、乳酪、(口)重要人物、停止的人物、起司地 (乳酪)
cheese.col: say cheese (笑一個), cheese board, cottage cheese, blue cheese
cheese.ex: I like to have some blue cheese with my fresh morning crackers.

cheesecake.def: 乳酪蛋糕、性感照片的人物 (單數)
cheesecake.ex: For dessert, they ordered a rich strawberry cheesecake each.

cheesy.def: 起司味的、(口)俗氣的、低劣的人人物 (俗)
cheesy.ex: The local movie ends with a very cheesy romantic scene.

cheetah.ex: The fast cheetah is the world's swiftest land animal today.

chef.def: 廚師、主廚、擔任廚師的人物、主理地 (廚)
chef.ex: The head chef carefully inspected every dish before it left.

chemical.def: 化學的、化學製品、化學品、化學的人的人物、化學地 (化)
chemical.col: chemical engineering, chemical reaction, chemical weapon
chemical.ex: The scientists are studying a complex chemical reaction.

chemically.ex: The waste water must be treated chemically before use.

chemise.def: 女襯衣、寬大連身裙的人物 (單數)
chemise.ex: She wore a simple silk chemise under her heavy winter coat.

chemist.def: 化學家、(英)藥劑師、藥房的人的人物 (單數)
chemist.ex: The local chemist gave her some medicine for her bad cough.

chemistry.def: 化學、相互吸引力(的人際關係)的人物 (單數)
chemistry.col: organic chemistry, physical chemistry, good chemistry
chemistry.ex: Organic chemistry is a difficult but very fascinating subject.

chemotherapy.ex: The patient began to undergo chemotherapy for his cancer.

chenille.def: 雪尼爾線、雪尼爾織物的人物 (單數)
chenille.ex: She bought a soft chenille throw for the living room sofa.

cheque/check.ex: He paid for the new furniture with a personal cheque today.

chequer/checker.def: 格子、棋盤、色塊的人 (或物) (格)
chequer/checker.ex: The wall was painted in a bold black and red chequer pattern.

cherish.def: 珍愛、懷抱(希望)、愛護的人的人、珍愛地 (珍)
cherish.col: cherish the memory, cherish a dream
cherish.ex: I will cherish the memory of our summer trip forever.

cherished.def: 珍愛的、受愛護的人的人 (或物) (珍)
cherished.ex: The old violin is one of her most cherished possessions.

cheroot.ex: He sat on the porch quietly smoking a long, dark cheroot.

cherry.def: 櫻桃、櫻桃木、鮮紅色的的人物、櫻桃地 (櫻)
cherry.col: cherry blossom (櫻花), cherry tomato, cherry on top
cherry.ex: The cherry trees are full of beautiful pink blossoms tonight.

cherub.def: 胖娃娃、小天使人物 (單數)
cherub.ex: A small golden cherub was carved above the church door.

cherubic.def: 似天使的、可愛的人的人物
cherubic.ex: The baby had a cherubic face with large, bright blue eyes.

chess.def: 西洋棋、國際象棋人物 (單數)
chess.col: chess board, chess player, chess piece
chess.ex: He spends his Sunday afternoons playing chess in the park.

chessboard.ex: They set up the game on a grand black and white chessboard.

chest.def: 胸部、大箱子、金庫、裝入箱中、胸部的人物 (胸)
chest.col: chest of drawers (五斗櫃), tool chest, get off one's chest
chest.ex: He felt a sharp pain in his chest during his morning run.

chestnut.def: 栗子、栗樹、栗色的、(口)老生常談人物 (栗)
chestnut.col: roast chestnut, chestnut hair, old chestnut
chestnut.ex: We bought a bag of hot roast chestnuts from a street seller.

chevalier.def: 騎士、爵士、紳士人物 (單數)
chevalier.ex: The brave chevalier was known for his courage and kindness.

cheviot.def: 契維特羊毛、羊毛布人物 (單數)
cheviot.ex: He wore a stylish grey suit made from heavy cheviot wool.

chevron.def: V形臂章、人字形圖案的人物 (單數)
chevron.ex: The sergeant wore three gold chevrons on his uniform sleeve.

chew.def: 咀嚼、沉思、嚼爛、吃的人的人物、咀嚼地 (嚼)
chew.col: chew over (深思), chew the fat (閒聊), chewable
chew.ex: You should chew your food thoroughly before swallowing it.

chewing.def: 咀嚼、正在嚼爛的人 (或物) (嚼)
chewing.ex: Chewing gum is not allowed during the long school lesson.

chewy.def: 有嚼勁的、難嚼的人人物 (韌)
chewy.ex: These chocolate chip cookies are wonderfully soft and chewy.

chianti.ex: They shared a bottle of classic Italian chianti with dinner.

chic.def: 時髦的、漂亮的、雅緻的人物 (雅)
chic.ex: She always looks effortlessly chic in her black designer dress.

chicane.def: 詭計、騙局、人為彎道、欺騙的人地 (詭)
chicane.ex: The race car slowed down to navigate the tight chicane.

chicanery.def: 強辯、欺騙、詭計的人物 (單數)
chicanery.ex: He was sick of the political chicanery and decided to resign.

chicano.def: 墨西哥裔美國人的人物 (單數)
chicano.ex: The museum celebrates the rich and diverse Chicano culture.

chick.def: 小雞、雛鳥、(口)少女的人物 (單數)
chick.ex: A small and fluffy yellow chick hatched from its egg today.

chicken.def: 雞、雞肉、膽小鬼、膽怯的、去抓雞、抓雞的人的人物、膽怯地 (雞)
chicken.col: chicken out (退縮), fried chicken, chicken pox (水痘)
chicken.ex: We decided to have roast chicken and salad for our Sunday lunch.

chickpea.ex: Hummus is a delicious paste made from mashed golden chickpeas.

chickweed.def: 繁縷、蘩縷(植物名)人物 (單數)
chickweed.ex: Common chickweed is a very widespread garden weed in spring.

chicle.def: 糖膠、口香糖原料人物 (單數)
chicle.ex: Natural chicle is a sap from trees used to make chewing gum.

chicory.def: 菊苣、菊苣根的人物 (單數)
chicory.ex: The small blue flowers of wild chicory grow along the road.

chide.def: 斥責、指責、指責的人的人、指責地 (責)
chide.ex: The teacher had to chide the student for his late arrival.

chief.def: 首領、長官、主要的、首席的人的的人物 (首)
chief.col: chief executive (執行長), chief justice, editor-in-chief
chief.ex: The chief reason for the failure of the plan was lack of funds.

chiefdom.def: 酋長管轄區、首領地位的人物 (單數)
chiefdom.ex: The ancient chiefdom covered a vast area of the river valley.

chiefly.ex: The report is concerned chiefly with the local economy.

chieftain.def: 酋長、首領、匪首的人物 (單數)
chieftain.ex: The tribal chieftain made all the important decisions today.

chiffon.def: 雪紡、薄綢、雅緻的飾物的人物 (單數)
chiffon.ex: She wore a light blue dress made of soft and airy silk chiffon.

chigger.ex: A biting chigger can cause a very itchy red rash on your skin.

chignon.ex: She wore her long golden hair in a neat and elegant chignon.

chihuahua.ex: Her tiny chihuahua followed her everywhere around the house.

chilblain.ex: He suffered from painful chilblains during the snowy winter.

child.def: 孩子、兒童、子女、產物的人物 (單數)
child.col: only child, child's play (易事), child prodigy, foster child
child.ex: The young child was playing happily with his wooden blocks.

childbirth.ex: The hospital offers several local classes on natural childbirth.

childhood.col: happy childhood, childhood friend, early childhood
childhood.ex: We spent a very happy childhood together in the countryside.

childish.def: 孩子氣的、幼稚的、單純的人的人物
childish.ex: His childish behavior annoyed his older sister at the party.

childishly.ex: He acted childishly when he didn't get what he wanted today.

childishness.ex: The argument was caused by his pure and simple childishness.

childless.ex: The childless couple decided to adopt a baby boy last year.

childlike.def: 天真爛漫的、單純的人的人物
childlike.ex: He watched the falling snow with a sense of childlike wonder.

chile/chili.ex: She added some chopped spicy chili to the vegetable soup.

chill.def: 寒冷、心驚、使冷卻、發冷、寒冷的、冷感的人的人物、冷卻地 (冷)
chill.col: chill factor (風寒指數), common chill, take the chill off
chill.ex: There was a sudden, sharp chill in the late evening air.

chilled.def: 冷卻了的、感冒的人的人 (或物) (冷)
chilled.ex: He drank a glass of chilled water after his afternoon run.

chiller.def: 冷卻器、恐怖小說人物 (單數)
chiller.ex: The milk was stored in the supermarket chiller cabinet tonight.

chilling.def: 令人恐懼的、使人發冷的人 (或物) (冷)
chilling.ex: The ghost story was truly chilling and made us feel afraid.

chime.def: 編鐘、鳴響聲、一致、和諧、響起的人的人物、鳴響地 (鳴)
chime.col: chime in (伴隨/插話), wind chime, clock chime
chime.ex: I heard the soft silver chime of the clock in the hall.
